meaning: n.拖把(俗称地拖),洗碗v.用拖把拖洗,擦,抹,扫荡
examples: Just a twist of the handle is all it takes to wring out the mop.
Irene's use of the mop had been a calculated attempt to cover up her crime.
I mop the kitchen floor twice a week.
At Newell Rubbermaid he has to make mop buckets and toilet brushes into winners.
The current experiment: a scooter that could be used to mop the floors of malls.
